title: Coursera India International Enterprises is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Coursera India International Enterprises is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Coursera India International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Subject Matter Expert based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Coursera India International Enterprises:
Coursera India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Coursera India International Enterprises!
